title: Seventh Shard Elder Dissent Record
description: Schema for a minority opinion issued by an Elder model during a Seventh Generation deliberation. Modeled on the principle of a reasoned judicial dissent: the verdict travels with the record, and the dissent is citable in future deliberations.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema. Must match the version in schema.json.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier — must match the session_id in the submitted session log file.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the session run.

elder.description: The model acting as Elder in this session.

model_source.description: Where the base model was obtained. E.g. 'huggingface:Nitral-AI/Anubis-Mini-8B', 'ollama:mistral', 'local'.

adapter.description: LoRA adapter name if used. E.g. 'seventh-gen-v2'. Omit if base model only.

adapter_source.description: Where the adapter was obtained. E.g. 'github:Mfox-research99/seventh-shard/adapters_anubis'. Omit if base model only.

adapter_hash.description: SHA-256 of the adapter safetensors file. Used for integrity verification.

elder_prompt_version.description: Version of the Elder SYSTEM_PROMPT used. Check config.py or CHARTER.md for version string. E.g. '1.0'.

hardware.description: Hardware the session ran on. E.g. 'Apple M1 16GB', 'NVIDIA RTX 3090 24GB', 'CPU-only'.

scenario.description: The scenario the Elder was responding to.

id.description: Canonical scenario ID. E.g. 'SC04', 'SC06', 'PROC'. Use IDs from config.py SCENARIOS.

label.description: Human-readable scenario label. E.g. 'SC04 — The Unaudited Sentence'.

prompt_version.description: Version of the canonical scenario prompt used. Check config.py. E.g. '1.0'.

custom_scenario.description: True if this is a non-canonical scenario not defined in config.py. If true, include full prompt text in session log.

verdict.description: The verdict outcome and whether this record represents a dissent.

majority.description: The majority verdict if running in a multi-model council. Omit for single-model sessions.

is_dissent.description: True if this_elder diverges from majority. True for single-model sessions where the Elder's verdict is being recorded as a minority position for the commons.

dissent.description: The substance of the minority opinion.

text.description: The full verbatim text of the Elder's dissenting response. Must match the session log exactly.

forward_conditions.description: Specific future conditions the Elder named that would vindicate this dissent. These are checkable against reality in future sessions. Be precise.

harm_patterns_named.description: Seventh Generation harm taxonomy patterns the Elder identified. See Soul.md Article IX.

reasoning_summary.description: One or two sentences summarizing the core of the dissent's reasoning. Written by the submitter, not the model.

session_log_file.description: Relative path to the full session log JSON submitted with this dissent. E.g. 'logs/anubis_suite_20260327_083447.json'.

session_log_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the session log file. Used by CI to verify integrity.

notes.description: Optional. Any additional context the contributor wants to add — about the run, the model behavior, or the deliberation.
